description_long: This is a single, old leather shoe with a visibly worn and weathered appearance. The shoe is ankle-high, with a soft, collapsed upper and a rounded toe, suggesting it has seen extensive use. The material appears to be dark brown leather, heavily creased and faded, with some areas showing discoloration and possible damage. The opening is irregular and frayed, and there are no visible laces or fasteners, indicating a slip-on or possibly a very old design. The sole is not clearly visible, but the overall structure is soft and flexible, lacking modern reinforcements. This shoe would likely be found discarded or lost in an urban environment, such as an alleyway or near a park.
description: A heavily worn, dark brown leather slip-on shoe with a collapsed, creased upper and frayed opening. The shoe shows significant signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collapsed, open top and rounded toe, with visible creases and fraying.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, soft upper and the lack of visible laces or fasteners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam and more pronounced wear and discoloration on the heel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the opening more visible, showing the interior lining and further fraying.
